actions_taken_iteration_62: 📊 Checked GitHub rate limit (5000/5000 available at start)
🔍 Discovered 4 new Dependabot PRs (fast-uri security updates + python-multipart)
⚠️ Confirmed all 4 new PRs blocked by Telegram notification step
📊 Verified CI success rate stable at 95.1% (173/182 passing)
✅ Confirmed all 9 failing repos unchanged (all non-actionable)
✅ Verified all 14 issues remain triaged, 1 untriaged already handled by bot
🔍 Identified critical blocker: dispatch.yaml Telegram step affects ALL Dependabot PRs
💾 Updated swarm state file to iteration 62

non_actionable_summary.critical_blocker: Telegram notification step in dispatch.yaml blocks ALL Dependabot PRs
non_actionable_summary.notes:
All 9 CI failures + 6 blocked PRs require either:
  1. GitHub Dependabot service fixes (5 repos - unchanged)
  2. External API fixes (GNOME: 2 repos)
  3. Secret distribution via profile repo setup.py (bin)
  4. Workflow architecture changes in dispatch.yaml (sodarr-chrome-plugin)
  5. **CRITICAL**: dispatch.yaml 'Notify Telegram pipeline started' needs continue-on-error: true (blocks 6 PRs)

No code-level fixes available in child repos. URGENT: Telegram blocker affects security updates.

next_iteration_strategy.priority_1: **URGENT**: Fix dispatch.yaml Telegram notification step to unblock 6 Dependabot PRs
next_iteration_strategy.priority_2: Monitor for resolution of blocked security updates (fast-uri, python-multipart)
next_iteration_strategy.priority_3: Continue monitoring for new issues or PRs
next_iteration_strategy.priority_4: Watch for new workflow failures that might be actionable
next_iteration_strategy.priority_5: Monitor for any regression in previously fixed repos

dispatch_yaml_improvements.issue: **CRITICAL** Telegram notification step blocks Dependabot PRs
dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Add 'continue-on-error: true' to 'Notify Telegram pipeline started' step in pipeline-start job
dispatch_yaml_improvements.impact: Would unblock 6 current security update PRs and prevent future Dependabot PR blocks
dispatch_yaml_improvements.fix:
In dispatch.yaml pipeline-start job, change:
  - name: Notify Telegram pipeline started
    continue-on-error: true  # <-- ADD THIS
    run: ...

dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Adjust path filter to trigger chrome-build when chrome-plugin/ dir exists

workflow_distribution.issue: 4 repos use master branch but workflows trigger on main
workflow_distribution.suggestion: Either rename default branches to main or update workflow triggers
